ground_truth.description: Photo of Red Bull F1 car inside Red Bull museum in Salzburg with plane in background. Should get from image, hopefully also Red Bull hangar.
ground_truth.photographer_description: Photo of a Red Bull F1 car inside the Red Bull museum in Salzburg with a plane in the background. It should get this from the image alone, hopefully also that it is the Red Bull Hangar.

entities.name: Hangar-7
entities.notes: Red Bull museum

reverse_geocoded.formatted_address: Hangar-7, Salzburg Airport, Wilhelm-Spazier-Straße 7a, 5020 Salzburg, Austria

details.description: Interior of a glass-and-steel domed hangar with a diagrid roof and a circular suspended platform. On the floor, roped off, is a Red Bull Racing Formula One car in the purple/blue Infiniti livery (car no. 3), fitted with Pirelli P Zero tires. Behind and above it stands a highly polished, bare-metal, multi‑engine vintage aircraft from The Flying Bulls collection, showing riveted aluminum skin and rectangular cabin windows. The space has dark glossy tile flooring, potted plants, and museum-style display lighting with daylight diffused through the glazed roof. The setting strongly matches Red Bull Hangar‑7’s exhibition floor at Salzburg Airport.

photographer_location.name: Inside Red Bull Hangar‑7, Salzburg Airport (SZG), Maxglan, Salzburg, Austria

subject_location.name: Exhibition floor, Red Bull Hangar‑7, Salzburg Airport (SZG)

details.description: Interior of Red Bull Hangar-7 in Salzburg, Austria. A highly polished silver aircraft fuselage is suspended overhead beneath a curved glass and steel lattice roof. In the foreground, two Red Bull Racing Formula 1 cars are on display on a dark tiled floor, featuring purple/blue livery, Infiniti branding, and visible Pirelli P Zero tires. A rope barrier runs in front of the cars, and a potted palm in a metallic planter adds a touch of greenery. The scene is bright with natural light filtering through the glass ceiling, giving a museum-like exhibition feel.

details.description: Interior view of Red Bull’s Hangar-7 at Salzburg Airport. In the foreground a Red Bull Racing Formula One car in dark blue/purple Infiniti livery with number 3 is displayed behind a rope barrier, wearing Pirelli P Zero slick tires and sponsors such as Total, Rauch and Exness. Behind it stands a large, mirror-polished vintage passenger aircraft with riveted aluminum skin and round windows (the Flying Bulls’ DC-6B). Overhead is Hangar-7’s dramatic glass-and-steel domed roof with a dense diagrid structure. The setting is a museum-style exhibition floor with other vehicles partly visible.

details.description: Inside Hangar-7 at Salzburg Airport, a display area features a gleaming, chrome-finished Formula 1 racing car with Red Bull livery in the foreground. The vehicle bears Infiniti branding and sponsor decals (e.g., Total). Behind it, another race car is partially visible. A polished aircraft fuselage is positioned nearby, reflecting light. A potted plant adds greenery, and the dark-tiled floor is visible. The ceiling showcases a distinctive glass-and-steel lattice roof characteristic of Hangar-7's architecture.

details.description: A high-angle interior shot of Hangar-7 in Salzburg, showcasing a collection of high-performance vehicles under a distinctive steel and glass grid-shell dome. In the immediate foreground sits a Red Bull Racing Formula 1 car, displaying the number 3 and the purple-and-blue Infiniti sponsorship livery (characteristic of the 2013-2015 era). Behind it, dominating the mid-ground, is the polished aluminum fuselage of a large vintage aircraft, a Douglas DC-6B. In the background, another Formula 1 car featuring a white Honda tribute livery is partially visible. The setting features a glossy dark tiled floor that reflects the intricate roof structure and the exhibits.

details.description: The interior of Red Bull Hangar-7 in Salzburg, Austria, featuring a distinctive high-tech glass and steel lattice dome. In the foreground is a Red Bull Racing Formula 1 car with a purple and dark blue Infiniti livery, bearing the number 3. Behind it stands a meticulously polished, silver Douglas DC-6B aircraft, part of The Flying Bulls collection. The floor is dark and reflective, and another F1 car is visible in the background. The lighting is bright and even, filtered through the complex glass roof structure.

details.description: Indoor exhibition space with a sweeping glass-and-steel lattice roof. In the foreground is a Red Bull Racing Formula One car in the purple/dark-blue Infiniti livery with Red Bull, Total, and Pirelli P ZERO branding, displayed behind a rope barrier on dark tiled flooring. The car carries a large number 3 on the nose. Immediately adjacent is the highly polished, riveted aluminum fuselage of a vintage aircraft. Additional Red Bull F1 cars and aircraft are visible further inside the hall. Daylight filters through the curved glass canopy, characteristic of Red Bull’s Hangar-7 display environment.

details.description: An indoor automotive display hall showing two Formula 1 cars. On the right is a Red Bull Racing F1 car in dark blue/black with yellow Pirelli P Zero tires and prominent sponsor logos. Beside it is a purple Lotus Renault GP (Lotus F1 Team) car with Infiniti branding and Total sponsorship visible. The floor is dark tiled and a rope barrier runs along the foreground. To the left, a large metallic aircraft fuselage section with riveted panels and a cockpit window forms part of the exhibit. The space has a modern glass-and-steel ceiling structure with arches, plants, and additional display elements visible in the background.

details.description: Interior of a sleek glass-and-steel exhibition hangar with a curved lattice dome. In the foreground is a Red Bull Racing Formula One car in dark blue/purple livery with Red Bull, Infiniti, and Total branding and Pirelli P ZERO tires, roped off on dark tiled flooring. Behind it are additional Red Bull single-seaters and display items. To the left stands a large polished aluminum vintage propeller aircraft fuselage reflecting the space. The overall scene strongly matches Red Bull’s Hangar‑7 display setting, where the Flying Bulls aircraft and Red Bull Racing cars are exhibited.

The foreground car is a purple Infiniti/Red Bull-era F1 car with visible sponsor logos and Pirelli P Zero tires, accompanied by other Formula 1 cars in the background bearing Red Bull branding. The venue has a modern architectural interior with a curved metal/glass roof structure and exhibition stands, suggesting a museum or showroom environment dedicated to motorsport.

details.description: A high-angle, slightly tilted photograph taken inside a large, modern exhibition hangar characterized by a distinctive steel-and-glass grid shell roof structure. The interior features a polished dark floor reflecting the exhibits. On the left, the large, polished aluminum fuselage of a vintage Douglas DC-6B aircraft dominates the frame. To the right, a Red Bull Racing Formula One car is displayed, featuring a purple and dark blue livery with 'Infiniti', 'Total', and 'Red Bull' branding, and the number 3 on the nose. Behind the main F1 car, other racing vehicles, including another open-wheel car, are partially visible. The setting is bright, illuminated by natural light filtering through the geometric glass dome.

details.description: The image shows the interior of Hangar-7 at Salzburg Airport, featuring a combination of historic aircraft and modern racing cars. On the right side of the frame is a Red Bull Racing Formula 1 car, specifically the RB10 model from the 2014 season, identifiable by its 'Infiniti' and 'Red Bull' branding and the driver number 3 (Daniel Ricciardo). To the left is the highly polished, mirror-like aluminum fuselage of a Douglas DC-6B aircraft, a flagship of The Flying Bulls collection. The background is dominated by the hangar's distinctive high-tech architecture, consisting of a vast, curved glass dome supported by a complex lattice of steel ribs. The floor is made of dark, polished tiles that reflect the subjects and the overhead structure. Other racing cars and display elements are visible in the background, set within the bright, naturally lit space.
